name: icho648-plugin
description: Portable agent workflows for project guidance, grounded explanation, PRD authoring, implementation and review, plus evidence-based long-term learning.

interface.shortDescription: Project guidance, PRD delivery, explanation, and learning.
interface.longDescription: Six portable Agent Skills: setup-agent-guidance, grounded-explainer, write-prd, implement-prd, review-prd-implementation, and learn.
defaultPrompt: Use $setup-agent-guidance to initialize durable project guidance.
Use $write-prd, $implement-prd, or $review-prd-implementation for a PRD workflow.
Use $learn to build durable capability through evidence-based practice.
